title: Quote of the day by Andrew Carnegie: "The way to become rich is to put all your eggs in one basket and then watch that basket."
summary_full: Andrew Carnegie’s quote challenges the usual advice of spreading risk. Instead, it argues for focus. Pick one thing, commit fully, and pay close attention to it.
summary_public: Andrew Carnegie’s quote challenges the usual advice of spreading risk. Instead, it argues for focus. Pick one thing, commit fully, and pay close attention to it.
